extraction.one_line_summary: MCNULTY Brandon won Stage 15 after catching solo leader HEALY Ben on the descent, then outsprinting him and FRIGO Marco in Bergamo's finale.
tactical_patterns: HEALY Ben attacked with 35km solo after winning KOM battles, but was paced down on descent by MCNULTY's superior descending.
UAE allowed breakaway over 11 minutes despite AINA RUBIO's GC threat, signaling stage hunting over GC defense priorities.
GC group lost only 30 seconds on leader ALMEIDA showing teams already resting legs before Stage 16's Monte Bondone battle.

rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: won multiple KOM sprints and attacked solo from 35km, confirming he needs earlier attacks to avoid stronger finishers
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: first grand tour stage win after five attempts, closed gap on descent suggesting descending is stronger weapon than climbing
rider_signals.FRIGO Marco: positive: rejoined leaders after being dropped, then nearly won sprint showing Italian neo-pros reviving late in stages
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Bruno: negative: lost 30 seconds on stage 15 before key mountain test, suggesting Jumbo setting tempo cracked him slightly
